description: Controller improvements, mob adjustments, duel timer, and healing sickness rework.

sections.heading: Controller Support Improvements
sections.description: Expanded controller functionality and added new control schemes.
items: Right shoulder enables target selection with right stick
Right stick opens radial context menu
New spell mode: cast on button release
sections.searchable_text: controller improvements radial menu targeting scheme

sections.heading: Ping System
sections.description: New hotkeys for attack and defend pings.

sections.heading: Guild Logo Changes
sections.description: Removal of political symbols from guild logos.
items: Hammer and Sickle replaced with Hammer
Affected guilds can request a one-time logo change
Original creators can submit a new custom logo

notes: Now only casts if player health is above 50%
Now shows red arrow when player is a valid target

sections.heading: Duel Changes
sections.description: Duels now have a time limit.
items: Duels end in draw after timeout

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Shift-click sends items to secondary tab if open
sections.searchable_text: quality of life ui inventory chat

changes.raw_text: Now only triggered by Nature and Holy Staffs
notes: Healing from other sources no longer triggers Healing Sickness

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed Corrupted Dungeon entry with invisibility shrine
Fixed tradeable status of Festive Reindeer Stag Skin
Fixed UI inconsistencies in Destiny Board
Various UI, graphical, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: bug fixes ui controller dungeon silver
